arts.ttl: Newcastle join Chelsea & Spurs in race for teenage star who scored on international debut last week
arts.sum: Newcastle United have entered the race to sign Danish left-back Patrick Dorgu, according to reports. Chelsea and Tottenham Hotspur have been heavily linked with the 19-year-old, who has caught the eye with Italian side Lecce over the last 18 months, making 38 senior appearances. Dorgu’s form in Serie A has already seen him capped twice […] The post Newcastle join Chelsea & Spurs in race for teenage star who scored on international debut last week appeared first on CaughtOffside.

Supporters who have purchased an official ‘Cunha 12’ 2024/25 shirt from the Wolves Megastore or online at shop.wolves.co.uk can return it to the club for an exchange for the new number, up until 5pm on Monday 23rd September. Matheus Cunha surprised supporters in the Wolves Megastore on Friday afternoon, purchasing shirts for them with his new squad number on the back.

arts.ttl: Ryan Fraser shares details of awkward Newcastle return before Southampton move
arts.sum: Fraser reflects that his situation is 'nothing compared to what some people deal with' but admits it was a tricky time as he returned to a place of exile. Ryan Fraser has spoken out after a 'tough' summer at Newcastle United before his late deadline day return to Southampton.
